intent: SPF record exists on dtfstudio.fi authorising Resend to send from hello@dtfstudio.fi
Resend DKIM record (resend._domainkey) exists and has a public key

must_pass: bash -c 'RESP=$(curl -sf -H "Authorization: Bearer $RESEND_API_KEY" https://api.resend.com/domains); echo $RESP | python3 -c "import sys,json; domains=json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"data\",[]) if isinstance(json.load(open(\\\"\\\")), dict) else []"; echo $RESP | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); domains=d.get(\"data\",[]); assert any(dom.get(\"name\")==\"dtfstudio.fi\" for dom in domains), \"dtfstudio.fi not in Resend domains\"; print(\"domain ok\")"'
intent: dtfstudio.fi is registered and verified in Resend dashboard

must_pass: bash -c 'RESP=$(curl -sf -H "Authorization: Bearer $RESEND_API_KEY" "https://api.resend.com/emails?limit=10"); echo $RESP | python3 -c "import sys,json; body=sys.stdin.read(); d=json.loads(body); emails=d.get(\"data\",[]); delivered=[e for e in emails if e.get(\"last_event\") in (\"delivered\",\"opened\")]; print(\"delivered:\",len(delivered)); assert len(delivered) > 0, \"no delivered emails in last 10\"; print(\"ok\")"'
intent: At least one email in Resend events is in delivered/opened state (proves end-to-end delivery working)

must_pass: bash -c 'grep -n "catch {}" /Users/xavierandre/dtf-studio-2d-quoter/netlify/functions/send-quote.js | wc -l | xargs -I{} python3 -c "n=int(\"{}\"); assert n <= 1, f\"found {n} bare catch{{}} blocks — fix exception swallowing\"; print(\"catch-swallow check ok (\"+str(n)+\")\")"; exit 0'
intent: No more than 1 bare catch{} block in send-quote.js (existing one is in Telegram alert path — acceptable)

must_pass: bash -c 'RESP=$(curl -sf -H "Authorization: Bearer $RESEND_API_KEY" "https://api.resend.com/emails?limit=20"); echo $RESP | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); emails=d.get(\"data\",[]); admin=[e for e in emails if \"[Admin]\" in (e.get(\"subject\") or \"\")]; print(\"admin emails found:\",len(admin)); assert len(admin) > 0, \"no admin production-PDF emails found in last 20 events\"; print(\"ok\")"'
intent: Admin PRODUCTION-PDF email (subject contains [Admin]) appears in Resend events — proves both email branches fire
